violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Empanadas were observed held at 111 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Empanadas were voluntarily disposed of. Water added to hot hold unit, and temperature turned higher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door low boy. The top of the pizza prep unit was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2025
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms that open to areas of food preparation must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hoods systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener and slicer were cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The cutting boards in the (kitchen) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
The (ceiling) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Establishment is using Time as a Public Health Control without RIDOH approval. PIC said a letter asking for approval was written. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

The design of the slicer has gaps between pieces of metal and exposed hardware, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Slicer was taken permanently out of service and must be removed from the establishment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the blender bases have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
Panels beneath the hood have an accumulation of soil residue, dust and grease. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
